title: C. The Personal Data Subject has the right to claim before the competent court for compensation for material or moral damage

evidence.raw_text:
C. The Personal Data Subject has the right to claim before the competent court for 
compensation for material or moral damage in proportion to the magnitude of the damage arising from the application of these Standard Contractual Clau
evidence.clean_text: The Personal Data Subject has the right to claim before the competent court for compensation for material or moral damage in proportion to the magnitude of the damage arising from the application of these Standard Contractual Clauses.
